# Contact us
Looking for our [Headquarters](https://www.africa-re.com/contact/load_region_office?contact%5Bcountry%5D=headquarters) or [Africa Retakaful](https://retakaful.africa-re.com) ?
## Proudly African.
International Standards.
We are the foremost regional reinsurance institution dedicated to the African continent and open to select markets in Asia, Brazil and the Middle East. We have unique local expertise in offering security to our clients, with strong capitalization and A-grade international ratings supporting our bespoke reinsurance solutions.
Casablanca Dubai Addis Ababa Johannesburg Nairobi Ebene Abidjan Cairo Lagos
